tool_input.command: cat runs/20260721_075849_iter1/agent_result.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:3000])"
date; head -40 runs/20260721_075849_iter1/prompt.md; xxd -l 200 model/pretrained/mnv3s_features8.pt | head -10
tool_input.description: Check current time, run prompt, and pretrained file header

tool_input.command: sqlite3 experiments.sqlite "SELECT arch_svg FROM experiments WHERE id=10;" > /tmp/exp10.svg; wc -c /tmp/exp10.svg

.venv/bin/python - <<'EOF'
import time, torch
import numpy as np
from model.model import build_model, export_onnx, loss_fn

m = build_model(pretrained=True)   # strict=True load inside — fails loudly on any mismatch
print("strict pretrained load: OK")
n_params = sum(p.numel() for p in m.parameters())
print("total params:", n_params)

m.eval()
x = torch.rand(2, 3, 128, 128)
with torch.no_grad():
    out, logits = m(x, return_logits=True)
print("out:", out.shape, "logits:", logits.shape)
assert out.shape == (2, 3) and logits.shape == (2, 1024)
assert (out[:, :2] >= 0).all() and (out[:, :2] <= 1).all()
y = torch.rand(2, 2)
l = loss_fn(out, logits, y)
print("loss:", float(l))

# backward pass sanity (training path)
m.train()
out, logits = m(x, return_logits=True)
loss_fn(out, logits, y).backward()
g = m.features[0][0].weight.grad
print("trunk grad flows:", g is not None and float(g.abs().sum()) > 0)

export_onnx(m, "/tmp/exp11_test.onnx")
import os
sz = os.path.getsize("/tmp/exp11_test.onnx")
print(f"ONNX size: {sz/1048576:.2f} MiB (gate 4 MiB)")

import onnxruntime as ort
sess = ort.InferenceSession("/tmp/exp11_test.onnx", providers=["CPUExecutionProvider"])
xi = np.random.rand(1, 3, 128, 128).astype(np.float32)
sess.run(None, {"frame": xi})  # warmup
t0 = time.time()
for _ in range(20):
    r = sess.run(None, {"frame": xi})
print(f"latency proxy: {(time.time()-t0)/20*1000:.2f} ms (gate 250 ms)")
print("uvc:", r[0][0])

# parity: torch vs onnx
with torch.no_grad():
    ot = m(torch.from_numpy(xi)).numpy()
print("torch/onnx max abs diff:", float(abs(ot - r[0]).max()))
EOF
tool_input.description: Validate pretrained trunk load, forward, ONNX export, latency
Run validation with repo on PYTHONPATH
Render SVG thumbnail via Quick Look
Render SVG thumbnail via Quick Look
